name: Unter Null
description: '''Unter Null''', was founded as a solo [[aggrotech]] music project by '''Erica Dunham''' in 1998 at the age of 17, while living in [[Seattle]], United States. Dunham is trained in [[Piano|classical piano]], [[cello]] and [[guitar]]. Live performances consist of Dunham on lead vocals, Brendin Ross (formerly of the band [[Bile (band)|Bile]]) on keyboards and Krz Souls (of the band [[Dawn of Ashes]]), on e-percussion. {{As of|2012}}, Erica Dunham, and Unter Null, are situated in [[Portland, Oregon]].
